down_to_earth.title: Correct Placement Strategy
down_to_earth.principle: Place the red ball near the edge of the platform to maximize the impulse force on the green ball, ensuring it falls off the edge.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the green ball is positioned such that one side of the platform has a clear gap.

down_to_earth.title: Adjust Radius for Effective Push
down_to_earth.principle: Reduce the red ball's radius to allow closer proximity to the green ball without overlapping, increasing the pushing force.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the red ball needs to be placed very close to the green ball to initiate the push.

down_to_earth.title: Gap Width Analysis
down_to_earth.principle: Analyze the available gaps on the platform to determine the optimal direction to push the green ball based on its size and position.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the green ball is positioned such that multiple gaps are available on the platform.

down_to_earth.title: Initial Velocity Consideration
down_to_earth.principle: Ensure the red ball is placed in a way that it can impart sufficient velocity to the green ball to overcome gravity and push it off the platform.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the green ball is positioned near the edge of the platform and the red ball needs to be placed to create a significant impulse.

down_to_earth.title: Avoid Invalid Actions
down_to_earth.principle: Ensure the red ball is placed within the world bounds and does not overlap with other objects to avoid invalid action errors.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: At the start of each attempt to place the red ball.

down_to_earth.title: Gap Analysis Insight
down_to_earth.principle: Identifying the correct gap for the green ball to fall through based on its position relative to the platform edges.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When determining the best location to place the red ball to push the green ball off the platform.

down_to_earth.title: Velocity Consideration
down_to_earth.principle: Understanding that pushing the green ball off the platform will impart a velocity that needs to be accounted for to ensure it reaches the ground within the required time.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: After successfully pushing the green ball off the platform, simulate its movement to verify it will reach the ground in the necessary timeframe.

down_to_earth.description: Incorrectly placed the red ball outside the world bounds.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: The agent did not properly validate the red ball's position before attempting to place it.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Always check if the proposed position of the red ball is within the world bounds before executing the action.

down_to_earth.description: Failed to account for the green ball's velocity after being pushed off the platform.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: The agent assumed the green ball would remain stationary after being pushed, without considering its resulting velocity.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Simulate the effect of the push to determine the green ball's new position and velocity, ensuring it reaches the ground within the required time.

down_to_earth.description: Incorrectly interpreted the gap analysis results.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: The agent misread the gap analysis, leading to an incorrect decision on where to place the red ball.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Double-check the gap analysis results and ensure the interpretation aligns with the actual physical constraints of the environment.
